event: Fashion model wearing a designer dress
description: A full-length fashion photograph of a woman with long red hair wearing a loose-fitting black knee-length dress decorated with bold white abstract brushstroke patterns. She wears white cropped leggings underneath and black pointed high-heeled shoes. The background is plain white. The model stands in a neutral pose, looking directly at the camera.

_meta.title: AMSTERDAM: Sumi/Shuimo turned into fashion design print (Igor Dobranić Summer 2017 Collection)
